title: Core Competencies Glossary
text:
All core competencies can be assigned into one of four categories:  Values,  Skills,  Stewardship, and  Results. Click the relevant tab below for more details on the competencies within each category.

 Values | Valores Skills | Habilidades Stewardship | Fortalecimiento Results | Resultados










Competency
Description
Performance Indicators




Practice entrepreneurialism
Passionate about new ideas and emerging possibilities, and willingness to show up to meet needs
 Is passionate about possibility and recognizes paths for emergence of new ideas and processes   Takes ownership across levels of work, approaching administrative, operational, and strategic needs as essential steps in realizing possibility


Exercise creative courage
Act with curiosity and bravery, share bold ideas, and embrace both experimentation and the inevitable mistakes that come with trying something new
 Cultivates and demonstrates a personal ethos of curiosity and courage to think, feel, share and act creatively   Sets clear, but kind boundaries   Invites sharing and celebration of wild ideas along with the mistakes that will come when trying them


Take action to learn
Pursue learning through deliberate action, balance reflection with progress, and work steadily toward long-term goals despite challenges
 Designs a personal learning pathway; co-creates opportunities for learning   Balances quick action with thoughtful reflection


Empathize
Listen deeply to others’ experiences, and create opportunities that center the voices of the people and communities you are working with
 Actively seeks insight from the experience and perspective of others   Empathizes from a place of love, respect and curiosity


Embrace vulnerability
Step into uncertainty with openness, ask for support and feedback, and own your learning and growth with honesty and courage
 Seeks help, feedback and collaboration   Owns where they are and what they need to learn


Work with adaptability
Embrace change, pivot with intention, and stay open to evolving paths and outcomes
 Shows an ability and willingness to pivot and course correct, and stay open to what the process and results look like













Competency
Description
Performance Indicators




Bring vision to life | Dar vida a la visión
Passionately co-creates an inspiring vision, translate it into clear agreements and goals, and follow through with disciplined prioritization and daily execution
 Passionately co-creates an inspiring vision, shares the big picture, and follows through to execution of vision   Creates clear team agreements, goals, expectations, and co-constructed narratives   Demonstrates ability to prioritize, organize, calendar and manage tasks and key milestones


Candid communication | Comunicación sincera
Speak and write openly, honestly, and with compassion, keeping messages clear, timely, and accessible
 Adapts language, tone, and style to different audiences and contexts to connect effectively across differences   Communicates with authentic candor and compassion, sharing truth while owning their impact on others   Shares information consistently and in a timely manner to maintain alignment, and when out of alignment to name it and address it in real time   Models excellent writing skills and professional email correspondence  Expresses ideas clearly and concisely, making complex concepts accessible


Distributed leadership | Liderazgo distribuido
Step up to lead where opportunities arise and create space for others to lead, share power, and break down top-down structures through collaboration
 Actively creates space for others to lead and contribute, recognizing diverse strengths   Identifies need and steps into leadership, taking initiative to move work forward   Shares decision-making to distribute authority and fosters shared ownership   Delegates thoughtfully, assigning tasks and responsibilities in ways that build skills, empower others, and foster shared accountability


Systems Thinking & Synthesis | Pensamiento sistémico y síntesis
Seek diverse perspectives, connect insights across sources, and generate questions and conclusions to understand how systems work.
 Identifies patterns and root causes by questioning assumptions and analyzing complex problems across systems   Transforms complexity into clarity by integrating diverse data and perspectives into actionable insights and decisions


Progressive technology | Tecnología progresiva
Profficient in utilizing various technological tools and platforms, both current and emergent
 Open to learning and exploring new technological tools, systems, and processes   Utilizes technological tools and platforms efficiently and effectively to fulfill the objectives at hand













Competency
Description
Performance Indicators




Active listening | Escucha activa
Stay fully present, ask open-ended questions, listen for story and possibility, and build on others’ ideas while centering voices that are often unheard
 Actively listens to, demonstrates understanding and builds on the thoughts and ideas of others   Asks open ended questions, not leading questions   Embraces the silent space


Move at the speed of trust | Muévete a la velocidad de la confianza
Build mutual respect and understanding by meeting people where they are, investing in relationships with intention and patience, and recognizing that collaborative processes are nonlinear
 Is transparent and authentic about realistic process and outcomes, and follows through on commitments   Holds a safe space and facilitates continual engagement   Recognized and embraces nonlinear nature of the work including forward and backward steps


Embrace complexity | Abraza la complejidad
Sit with uncertainty and discomfort, avoid quick fixes, and create space for thoughtful sense-making before acting
 Builds comfort with the mess and avoids the quick fix   Creates opportunities for sense making before decision making


Work to transform power | Trabaja para transformar el poder
Reflect on system dynamics, co-create ways to shift imbalances, and design spaces that share power rather than concentrate it
 Creates spaces and structures that distribute power rather than concentrate it   Pauses to reflect on team and system dynamics, and personal power and influence


Build capacity in others | Potencia las habilidades de otros
Share knowledge openly, co-create goals and agreements, and mentor and support others to strengthen collective leadership
 Practices transparency and non-attachment when sharing with collaborators   Engages others in designing processes and solutions, building shared ownership   Shares instead of sells. Shares as an opportunity to learn with our team   Invests in next generation leaders and offers mentorship and support













Competency
Description
Performance Indicators




Deliver high quality results | Entrega resultados de alta calidad
Produce work that meets high standards and take accountability when outcomes fall short
 Content, deliverables and design are high quality   Completes tasks accurately and on time, ensuring records, documentation, and processes are organized, accessible, and support smooth organizational operations   Takes accountability where results fall short


Drive cycles of continuous improvement and evolution | Impulsa ciclos de mejora continua y evolución
Release what’s done, stay curious about what’s next, and iterate openly with team to keep evolving
 Demonstrates ability to let go and liberate what comes next   Maintains open communication and reflection with team. Iteration


Tell the story | Comparte la historia
Celebrate successes, share key learnings, and capture work in ways that inspire learning, replication, and broader impact
 Celebrates the successes   Identifies, models and share key learnings   Builds models and documents work for wide-spread recycling, learning and use


Ensure belonging, access and opportunity | Garantiza pertenencia, acceso y oportunidad
Ensure an experience of belonging, access and opportunity externally and internally
 Shares credit and recognition broadly, ensuring contributions are visible across all levels and identities   Team members and partners consistently report feeling valued, included, and able to contribute fully   Barriers to participation (structural, cultural, or logistical) are reduced or eliminated, resulting in broader and more diverse engagement


Achieve progress towards goals, mission and vision | Logra avances hacia las metas, misión y visión
Achieves large-scale goals that integrate a collective of diverse interests over time
 Collective priorities are translated into clear milestones, and measurable progress toward long-term goals is consistently demonstrated
